tool_plan.objective: Read the Google Chrome web browser cache folder on Windows and display a list of files currently stored in the cache, with associated metadata, and allow exporting the list and extracting selected cached files.

required_actions.name: browser.launch
required_actions.why: Creates/updates Chrome cache entries so the cache folder contains items for ChromeCacheView to enumerate.

required_actions.name: browser.goto
required_actions.why: Generates cacheable web resources (URLs/content types) that should appear as cache items with metadata.

required_actions.name: browser.close
required_actions.why: Finalizes writes to the on-disk cache so Cache_Data is in a stable state for parsing/export.

completion.detail: Complete when the Chromium/Chrome disk cache artifact (chromium.cache.cache_data) is present after browser.close, indicating on-disk cache data exists for ChromeCacheView to enumerate/export.

tool_plan.action_intent_guidance: Action Flow: 1) browser.launch: Start Google Chrome in a normal browsing context so it will write to the standard on-disk cache. 2) browser.goto: Navigate to a few distinct, stable, cache-generating p

_provenance.notes: 3-stage TMI: IR -> bounded mapping -> tool_plan (leaf artifact keys only; with JSON repairs)
